description: Analyze the metallographic sample image at `~/Fiji_Data/raw/surface/surface_scan.tif`. Calibrate the image spatially using a scale of 2 pixels per 1 µm. Extract horizontal and vertical intensity line profiles across the middle of the image, saving them to `~/Fiji_Data/results/surface/horizontal_profile.csv` and `~/Fiji_Data/results/surface/vertical_profile.csv`. Calculate surface roughness parameters (where Intensity = Height in nm) and create a text report at `~/Fiji_Data/results/surface/roughness_report.txt` containing the keys: Ra, Rq, Rz, Mean_height, and Median_height. Generate a 3D surface plot saved to `~/Fiji_Data/results/surface/surface_plot_3d.png` and an annotated version of the original image with a 50 µm scale bar to `~/Fiji_Data/results/surface/annotated_image.png`.
